title: rubus × semiaurensis
intro: Rubus × semiaurensis is a hybrid species of the genus Rubus, commonly known as a semi-golden black raspberry or a semi-golden thimbleberry. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × semiaurensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus × semiaurensis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, and is also consumed fresh or frozen as a nutritious fruit.
